figures.caption: Table 1. Performance of each baseline method on the specification generation task. Prec.: precision, Rec.: recall, both in percentages.
Fig. 3. An example of a specification sketch towards the proof of verification targets.
Fig. 4. Illustration of specification refinement mechanism.

Fig. 1. An example program segment from open-source repository X509-parser, the program specifications generated by each baseline method, and the corresponding verification results for the target property. 1⃝∼ 3⃝ marked three program points of interest where specifications should be generated, i.e., pre/post-conditions for the two functions and loop invariants for the loop within. 4⃝ marked the target property, on which the verification relies on the aforementioned specifications.
